title: selaginella rupestris var. montanensis
intro: Selaginella rupestris var. montanensis is a rare and unique species of the Selaginella genus, commonly referred to as a 'resurrection plant' due to its ability to revive itself after being dried out. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella rupestris var. montanensis include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its ability to act as a natural antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, or topical creams for various health benefits.
